initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Symptoms = 'outpatient' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Symptoms = 'inpatient' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_to_inpatient_ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SLE';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Symptoms LIKE '%outpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Symptoms LIKE '%inpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_to_inpatient_ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SLE';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.Symptoms LIKE '%outpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.Symptoms LIKE '%inpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_to_inpatient_ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SLE';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.Symptoms LIKE '%outpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.Symptoms LIKE '%inpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_to_inpatient_ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SLE';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN Symptoms LIKE '%outpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Symptoms LIKE '%inpatient%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_to_inpatient_ratio
FROM Patient p
JOIN Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis = 'SLE';
